In the said notification, in the Table, after serial No. 14 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial No. and entries relating thereto shall be inserted, namely:- [} @ ® “15 Scientist ‘D’, ‘E’ and ‘F’, the Central Pollution Control Board ‘Whole of India.” [F. No. Q-15014/17/2018-CPW] RITESH KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.0. 394(E), dated the 16" April, 1987 and subsequently amended vide S.0. 237 (E), dated the 29" March, 1989, S.0. 656 (E), dated the 21 August, 1989, S.0. 624 (E), dated the 3" September, 1996, G.S.R. 587 (E), dated the 1% September, 2006, S.0. 2412 (E), dated the 22™ September, 2009, and S.0. 2763 (E), dated the 10" November, 2010.
